heading: Fisheries enforcement plans and reporting
label: 1861b Fisheries enforcement plans and reporting
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Coast Guard and Maritime Transportation Act of 2004, and not as part of the Magnuson-Stevens Fishery Conservation and Management Act which comprises this chapter.

Termination of Reporting RequirementFor provision terminating reporting requirement under this section, see , set out as a Combination of Fisheries Enforcement Plans and Foreign Fishing Incursion Reports note under .section 4(b) of Pub. L. 111–207section 1828 of this title

children.heading: Fisheries enforcement plans
children.label: a Fisheries enforcement plans
children.text: In preparing the Coast Guard’s annual fisheries enforcement plan, the Commandant of the Coast Guard shall consult with the Under Secretary of Commerce for Oceans and Atmosphere and with State and local enforcement authorities.

children.heading: Fishery patrols
children.label: b Fishery patrols
children.text: Prior to undertaking fisheries patrols, the Commandant of the Coast Guard shall notify the Under Secretary of Commerce for Oceans and Atmosphere and appropriate State and local enforcement authorities of the projected dates for such patrols.

children.heading: Annual summary
children.label: c Annual summary
children.text: The Commandant of the Coast Guard shall prepare and make available to the Under Secretary of Commerce for Oceans and Atmosphere, State and local enforcement entities, and other relevant stakeholders, an annual summary report of fisheries enforcement activities for the preceding year, including a summary of the number of patrols, law enforcement actions taken, and resource hours expended.
